props.ChoiceText: You got farther by bargaining with the people who knew the river better than your patron ever would.
props.ChoiceBio: A river bargain taught you that language and humility can carry an expedition farther than rank.

1.TransitionText: Because a river bargain taught you that language and humility can carry an expedition farther than rank, routes and strange goods taught you to live by exchange.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a river bargain taught you that language and humility can carry an expedition farther than rank, the next unknown road lay across water more often than land.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Sailor, but you may remain on your current path instead.
